title: juncus bulbosus var. compressus
intro: Juncus bulbosus var. compressus, also known as Compressus Soft Rush, is a variety of the Juncus bulbosus plant, a type of flowering plant in the rush family (Juncaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Juncus bulbosus var. compressus is often made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
